title: Lord, Our Lord, Thy Glorious Name

verses.text: Infant lips thou dost ordain wrath and vengeance to restrain; weakest means fulfill thy will, mighty enemies to still. How great thy name! Lord, our Lord, in all the earth, how great thy name! Thine the name of matchless worth, excellent in all the earth; how great thy name!

Moon and stars in shining height nightly tell their maker's might; when thy wondrous heav'ns I scan, then I know how weak is man. How great thy name! Lord, our Lord, in all the earth, how great thy name! Thine the name of matchless worth, excellent in all the earth; how great thy name!

What is man that he should be loved and visited by thee, raised to an exalted height, crowned with honor in thy sight! How great thy name! Lord, our Lord, in all the earth, how great thy name! Thine the name of matchless worth, excellent in all the earth; how great thy name!

With dominion crowned he stands o'er the creatures of thy hands; all to him subjection yield in the sea and air and field. How great thy name! Lord, our Lord, in all the earth, how great thy name! Thine the name of matchless worth, excellent in all the earth; how great thy name!
